meta.look: Dimensional 3D — glossy nodes, layered platforms, gradient depth. The depth conveys the content relationship (layers / hierarchy / convergence); it is NOT a deck-wide style lock. Recolor the base hexes to the deck palette so it blends into any deck.
meta.usage: Use full-slide OR scale into an in-page region via data-native-diagram (x/y/w/h). `density` says how small it can shrink and stay legible: low = fine as a small element, high = needs most of the slide.
meta.select_by: content relationship (type/use) x item count (slots) x content-per-slot (holds); place full-slide or as a region within the density limit.
meta.conf_note: type = visual pass (reliable); slots = coarse range; refine during curation. conf: high = studied/unambiguous, approx = contact-sheet read.

combo_product_system.pick: Pick to show two whole models side by side under one title (composed 013+024).

solid3d_bluegreen_003.scenario: data-governance / security model / inputs feeding a central platform (top-down)
solid3d_bluegreen_003.pick: Pick for several inputs/categories feeding one concept from above (top-down). Skip if radial hub (031) or convergence-to-platform (066).
solid3d_bluegreen_003.distinct: A row of labeled cards across the top feeds a central node — top-down intake, not a radial ring.

solid3d_bluegreen_004.scenario: maturity model / value hierarchy / capability tiers / priority levels
solid3d_bluegreen_004.pick: Pick for maturity model / value hierarchy / capability tiers / priority levels — bottom-wide hierarchical tiers: ~3-5 tiers, each holds short-label. Skip if not a hierarchy structure, or item count far from 3-5.

solid3d_bluegreen_005.scenario: conversion / sales pipeline / screening / data refinement
solid3d_bluegreen_005.pick: Pick for conversion / sales pipeline / screening / data refinement — a top-wide narrowing flow / convergence to one outcome: ~3-5 stages, each holds label+short-desc. Skip if not a convergence structure, or item count far from 3-5.

solid3d_bluegreen_007.pick: Pick for two-sided platform (supply<->demand) / intermediary / converge-then-distribute — an hourglass/bowtie — converges to a center then diverges (many-in, many-out): ~3-5 stages, each holds label+short-desc. Skip if not a convergence structure, or item count far from 3-5.

solid3d_bluegreen_012.scenario: maturity model / value hierarchy / 3-tier capability or priority
solid3d_bluegreen_012.pick: Pick for a 3-level hierarchy / precedence / maturity. Skip if >4 levels or nested layers (013).
solid3d_bluegreen_012.distinct: A solid upward 3-tier pyramid seated on a platform.

solid3d_bluegreen_013.scenario: platform / tech stack (core -> ecosystem) / layered architecture
solid3d_bluegreen_013.pick: Pick for a platform where each layer envelops the inner (core -> capabilities -> ecosystem). Skip if flat stacked tiers (pyramid).
solid3d_bluegreen_013.distinct: Concentric nested ellipse rings; each ring is a layer that wraps the inner one (core -> ecosystem).

solid3d_bluegreen_016.scenario: platform or tech stack / layered architecture / service tiers
solid3d_bluegreen_016.pick: Pick for platform or tech stack / layered architecture / service tiers — stacked/concentric platforms, each layer holding several items: ~3-6 layers, each holds label+items. Skip if not a hierarchy structure, or item count far from 3-6.

solid3d_bluegreen_018.pick: Pick for parallel options / N-column comparison / step list / pillars — parallel items on a row of platforms/pillars: ~3-6 items, each holds label+short-desc. Skip if not a comparison structure, or item count far from 3-6.

solid3d_bluegreen_021.scenario: capability map / system architecture / methodology / org or relationship model
solid3d_bluegreen_021.pick: Pick for capability map / system architecture / methodology / org or relationship model — a central concept feeding several parts (hub-and-spoke): ~4-8 satellites, each holds short-label. Skip if not a relationship structure, or item count far from 4-8.

solid3d_bluegreen_024.scenario: value-centric model / factors revolving around one goal / marketing model
solid3d_bluegreen_024.pick: Pick for several factors revolving around one central value/goal. Skip if many-to-one convergence (066).
solid3d_bluegreen_024.subform: orbital ring around a central value
solid3d_bluegreen_024.distinct: Labeled nodes orbit a central value pair on a 3D platform, with side annotation columns.

solid3d_bluegreen_031.scenario: one-core-many-aspects model / capability hub / concept breakdown
solid3d_bluegreen_031.pick: Pick for one core concept with ~5-6 surrounding aspects (even radial hub). Skip if many-to-one convergence (066) or top-down feed (003).
solid3d_bluegreen_031.distinct: One large central sphere ringed by small satellite nodes — the classic even hub-spoke.

solid3d_bluegreen_036.scenario: capability matrix / module or product portfolio / parallel feature set
solid3d_bluegreen_036.pick: Pick for 6-8 parallel modules/capabilities of equal weight. Skip if 2-axis quadrants or a hierarchy.
solid3d_bluegreen_036.distinct: 6 module cards laid out in a grid on a platform — parallel capabilities, not quadrants.

solid3d_bluegreen_040.pick: Pick for parallel options / N-column comparison / step list / pillars — parallel items on a row of platforms/pillars: ~3-6 items, each holds label+short-desc. Skip if not a comparison structure, or item count far from 3-6.

solid3d_bluegreen_066.distinct: 7 labeled spheres arc into a central vortex that fans down to base labels — many sources converging into one platform.
